Description:
Ballistics of the 3OF19, 3OF26 HE-F-FS shell fired from D-81 gun.

Round	Proj	Charge
3VOF22	3OF19	4Zh40/52
3VOF36	3OF26	4Zh40/52

Charge 4Zh52:	5 kg 12/7 V/A
Charge 4Zh40:	3 kg 15/1 V/A + 2 kg 12/7 V/A
4Zh40 (introudced in 1962) is interchangeable with 4Zh52 (introudced in 1976)

3OF19, 3OF26 (23kg):	
Temp.	M.V.	Pmcp
	m/s	MPa
-40°C	835	295
 15°C	850	350
 40°C	860	405
